result.stdout:
Description:
  Analyze .NET memory dump

Usage:
  Heartbeat [options]

Options:
  --dump <dump> (REQUIRED)  Path to a dump file
  --dac-path <dac-path>     A full path to the matching DAC dll for this process.
  --ignore-dac-mismatch     Ignore mismatches between DAC versions
  --version                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Analyze .NET memory dump

Usage:

Options:

  --dac-path <dac-path>     A full path to the matching DAC dll for this process.

  --version                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
